name: Homemade Cream Soup Substitute
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Instant non fat dry milk
1/4 cup Instant low sodium chicken bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the instant non fat dry milk, cornstarch, low sodium chicken bouillon, dried onion flakes, basil, thyme (if using), and pepper.
2. To make the equivalent of one can of soup, mix 1/3 cup of the mixture with 1 1/2 cups water in a saucepan.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens.
4. If desired, substitute beef bouillon for chicken bouillon or add mushrooms to create a mushroom soup base.
